## Type of Change

<!-- Mark with an 'x' the type(s) that apply -->

- [ ] 🆕 **Feature**: New functionality
- [ ] 🐛 **Bug Fix**: Fixes an issue
- [ ] 📝 **Documentation**: Documentation only changes
- [ ] 🎨 **Style**: Formatting, missing semicolons, etc.
- [ ] ♻️ **Refactor**: Code restructuring without behavior change
- [ ] ⚡ **Performance**: Performance improvements
- [ ] 🧪 **Test**: Adding or updating tests
- [ ] 🔧 **Build/CI**: Build system or CI changes
- [ ] 🧹 **Chore**: Maintenance or tooling

## Checklist

<!-- Mark completed items with 'x' -->

### Code Quality
- [ ] My code follows the project's style guidelines
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my code
- [ ] I have commented my code where necessary
- [ ] My changes generate no new warnings or errors

### Testing
- [ ] I have added tests that prove my fix/feature works
- [ ] New and existing unit tests pass locally
- [ ] I have tested on multiple browsers/devices (if applicable)

### Documentation
- [ ] I have updated the documentation accordingly
- [ ] I have updated the CHANGELOG.md (if applicable)

### Security
- [ ] I have checked for security vulnerabilities
- [ ] No sensitive data is exposed (API keys, passwords, etc.)
- [ ] Changes don't introduce security risks
